task_completion.description: Verify that a chart window for the SPY instrument is open.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' indicated in the title bar, tab, or chart background.

task_completion.description: Verify that the SPY chart is set to a daily timeframe.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The chart header, tab, or data series indicator shows 'Daily', '1 Day', or '1D'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a horizontal line is drawn at approximately $450.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal drawing line is visible on the chart, intersecting the right-hand price axis between $445.00 and $455.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that a horizontal line is drawn at approximately $420.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A horizontal drawing line is visible on the chart, intersecting the right-hand price axis between $415.00 and $425.00.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workspace is being saved to persist the annotations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader Control Center 'Workspaces' menu is open with a save option selected, a save confirmation dialog is visible, or the application is being closed with a prompt to save the workspace accepted.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 graphical user interface to draw lines and save the workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor interacting with chart drawing tools and menus, rather than terminal commands executing scripts.

integrity.description: The chart displays genuine market data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Candlesticks or price bars are visible on the chart corresponding to the SPY instrument, not a blank or mocked screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not cheat by manually editing workspace XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad) or IDEs are open showing NinjaTrader workspace configuration files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target instrument is SPY (SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust). Acceptable price levels for the horizontal lines are 445.00-455.00 and 415.00-425.00 (due to the ±$5 tolerance). Both $450 and $420 are realistic historical prices for SPY in the 2023-2024 period. NinjaTrader 8 workspaces are typically saved via the Control Center window -> Workspaces menu.
